name: graphify-pack
description: Knowledge-graph pack: the /graphify skill — turn any repo or folder (code, docs, media) into a persistent knowledge graph with community detection, query/path/affected tools, and HTML/JSON/Neo4j exports. Opt-in; REQUIRES the graphify CLI installed on the machine. Core's impact/refactor-plan commands use the graph when present and fall back to ripgrep without it.
